series_metadata.series_description: AUTHORIZES PAYMENT TO ANOTHER STATE AGENCY FOR GOODS, SUPPLIES, AND/OR SERVICES RENDERED AND SERVES AS THE BASIS FOR DISBURSING FUNDS

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: RETAIN FOR CURRENT AND 3 PRIOR FISCAL YEARS THEN DESTROY PROVIDED AUDITED BY AUDITOR OF STATE AND AUDIT REPORT IS RELEASED, Paper: Shred
